title: Docs MDX Fumadocs Runtime Tasks
principles: Use MDX as the authoring format and Fumadocs MDX as a thin source/compile layer.
Keep TaxKit-owned schemas, navigation, validation and service contracts in package-owned Effect code.
Do not let Fumadocs UI or generated source become the source of truth for TaxKit docs contracts.
Use strict Effect TypeScript patterns in every package/app slice.
Repeat code-quality, boundary and canonical-reuse audits in every task, not only at the final review.
End with an explicit seam, boundary and canonical-reuse audit before accepting the runtime architecture.

globalVerification.commitPolicy: Commit each coherent docs runtime slice after parent review, passing verification and a Changeset/no-Changeset decision. Do not batch content package, docs app, validation and seam-audit changes into one oversized commit.
requiredBeforeFinalPR: browser verification for the docs home page and one nested MDX page
snippet extraction/typecheck or explicit accepted exclusions
OpenAPI reference smoke or explicit accepted exclusion
architecture audit against docs/architecture/content-and-posts.md, docs/architecture/frontend.md, docs/architecture/package-ownership.md and docs/architecture/effect-services.md
strict Effect audit for meaningful linear Effect control flow, typed errors in .pipe(...), canonical Schema-derived types, no unsafe casts, no local DTO mirrors and no trivial helper sprawl
bun run changeset or explicit no-Changeset rationale
evidenceRequired: Final production, build, test and audit call graphs
List of Fumadocs-owned generated artifacts vs TaxKit-owned schemas/services
Docs app URL and browser verification notes
Example/snippet validation command output or accepted exclusions
OpenAPI reference validation output or accepted exclusion
Changeset path and release-train impact, or no-Changeset rationale

tasks.title: Create docs content package and Fumadocs source boundary
tasks.goal: Establish the package-owned MDX source, schema and generated-source boundary without building the docs app shell yet.
scope: Create private packages/docs-content package
Add source.config.ts for apps/docs/content using fumadocs-mdx
Add Effect Schema frontmatter/meta/navigation contracts
Add generated .source ownership and package README guidance
Keep the package source-only unless implementation proves a dist strategy
outputs: packages/docs-content/.source/* generated by fumadocs-mdx when build runs
tasks.implementationPrompt:
You are implementing exactly one task from the TaxKit spec/task list.

Before editing:

- Read the target spec, this task object, relevant current files, and the relevant docs in `docs/architecture/*`.
- Identify the owning package for every schema, type, ID, service, layer and tagged error you touch.
- Review the spec's call-graph diagrams before editing, and update/report them if implementation discovers a different final graph.

Implementation rules:

- MUST use Effect-native primitives when they fit: `Data`, `Schema`, `Array`, `Chunk`, `HashSet`, `HashMap`, `Match`, `Context`, `Layer`, `Config`, `Service`, `Record`, `Result`, `Exit`, `Bun`, `Platform`, `Command` and `ManagedRuntime`.
- Do not fall back to plain TypeScript control flow, nullable values, mutable records, mutable arrays, `switch`, `Object.values`, `Object.entries`, ad hoc `_tag` objects, unsafe casts, stringly branching, custom env parsing or hand-rolled runtime wrappers when an Effect/schema/platform primitive fits.
- Reuse canonical schema-derived types, branded IDs, tagged errors, service contracts and constructors from the owning package.
- Do not create mirrored DTOs, local duplicate types, local duplicate schemas or transport-only shape copies when an owning schema or API/SDK contract already exists.
- Keep one-off Effect error handling and transformations inline at the callsite. Do not extract tiny mapper/wrapper helpers for single-use `Effect.mapError`, `Effect.catchTag`, `Effect.catchAll` or `Effect.catchAllDefect`.
- Browser/runtime code must consume browser-safe API/SDK exports instead of importing server-only internals.
- Package-facing changes MUST add or update a Changeset with `bun run changeset`, using a user-facing changelog summary. If the task is not package-facing, state that explicitly in the handoff.

Verification and handoff:

- Run this task's mandatory verification gates, including `bun run verification` unless the task explicitly documents a narrower gate.
- Run task-specific tests, smoke checks or browser checks required by the task's blast radius.
- Audit the diff for helper sprawl, canonical type/schema/id/error reuse, unsafe casts, local DTO mirrors, stringly branching and browser-safe imports where relevant.
- Report the Changeset path and release-train impact, or report why no Changeset was required.
- Report changed files, verification commands, outcomes and residual risks.
- Report whether the final implementation still matches the spec's call graph.
- Do not start or delegate another task. The parent agent must review, audit, verify and explicitly accept this task before the next task begins.

Task-specific scope: create the private `@taxkit/docs-content` package and the thin Fumadocs MDX source boundary. Follow the source-only posts-package pattern in the `site` repository where it fits, but adapt names, schemas and validation to TaxKit. Do not build the docs app shell in this task.
mandatoryVerification: architecture audit against docs/architecture/content-and-posts.md and docs/architecture/package-ownership.md
strict Effect audit for meaningful linear Effect control flow, typed errors in .pipe(...), canonical Schema-derived types, no unsafe casts, no local DTO mirrors and no trivial helper sprawl
rg audit proving apps/docs does not import packages/docs-content internal generated files directly
bun run changeset or explicit no-Changeset rationale
completionCriteria: The docs content package owns canonical frontmatter, meta and navigation schemas.
Fumadocs generated source is behind the docs-content package boundary.
The package README documents source-only generated-source constraints.
No docs app route/runtime shell is introduced in this slice.
Parent agent accepted the task before the next delegation.

tasks.title: Add DocsContentService and validation policy
tasks.goal: Expose docs content through an Effect service and move validation policy into package-owned code.
scope: Add DocsContentService contract, live layer and tagged errors
Add getPage, listPages, getNavigation and validateContent operations
Move or replace apps/docs/scripts/validate-content.mjs with package-owned validation
Preserve existing public docs validation coverage
outputs: updated apps/docs validation script only if it remains as a thin compatibility wrapper

Task-specific scope: add the package-owned Effect service and validation policy for docs content. Validation must remain strict and at least preserve current coverage for frontmatter, navigation, local links, banned wording, stale public names and private downstream product terms.
mandatoryVerification: diff audit proving validation policy is package-owned and not duplicated in apps/docs
strict Effect audit for meaningful linear Effect control flow, typed errors in .pipe(...), canonical Schema-derived types, no unsafe casts, no local DTO mirrors and no trivial helper sprawl
bun run changeset or explicit no-Changeset rationale
completionCriteria: DocsContentService exposes a small package-owned contract.
Validation returns typed success/failure data or tagged expected errors.
The current content corpus validates through package-owned code.
No browser import consumes server-only source exports.
Parent agent accepted the task before the next delegation.

tasks.title: Create docs app runtime and route shell
tasks.goal: Create a working docs app that consumes the docs content service and renders MDX pages.
scope: Add private apps/docs package manifest and Vite/TanStack Start setup
Add docs routes for home and nested MDX pages
Add docs app runtime/service wiring
Keep content discovery in @taxkit/docs-content
Use Fumadocs UI aspects only where they remain thin and replaceable

Task-specific scope: build the first working docs app runtime. The app must consume @taxkit/docs-content instead of reading raw MDX/navigation files directly. Keep MDX renderer components app-local and small.
mandatoryVerification: browser verification for docs home page and one nested MDX page
rg audit proving apps/docs route loaders consume @taxkit/docs-content and do not import raw content files directly
rg audit proving browser modules do not import @taxkit/docs-content/server or generated .source/server files
strict Effect audit for meaningful linear Effect control flow, typed errors in .pipe(...), canonical Schema-derived types, no unsafe casts, no local DTO mirrors and no trivial helper sprawl
bun run changeset or explicit no-Changeset rationale
browserVerification: Open the docs app home route in a browser and confirm navigation renders.
Open one nested MDX page and confirm MDX content, headings, code blocks and navigation render without overlap.
completionCriteria: Docs app has a working local runtime and build.
Route loaders consume the content service boundary.
Renderer components are separate from content discovery.
Browser/server import boundaries are audited.
Parent agent accepted the task before the next delegation.

tasks.title: Wire reference, examples and OpenAPI validation
tasks.goal: Prove that generated/reference-like content and examples stay validated through the docs runtime.
scope: Integrate existing docs examples into validation
Add snippet extraction/typecheck where feasible
Add OpenAPI reference smoke or explicit accepted exclusion
Render reference/example pages through the docs app
Keep SDK/API/calculator contracts imported from owning packages
outputs: OpenAPI reference integration or documented exclusion

tasks.title: Update architecture docs and root verification wiring
tasks.goal: Make the docs runtime durable in architecture docs and root verification without overloading the repo workflow.

Update package ownership and frontend docs
Update root or package verification scripts only where stable
Record generated vs hand-written reference ownership

Package/app READMEs route future contributors correctly.
Parent agent accepted the task before the next delegation.

tasks.title: Run final seam, boundary and canonical-reuse audit
tasks.goal: Audit the completed implementation and record follow-ups for seams, boundaries and canonical reuse.
scope: Audit package boundaries between apps/docs, packages/docs-content, Fumadocs generated source and renderer components
Audit canonical schema/type/id/error reuse
Audit Fumadocs dependency and type leakage
Audit browser/server import boundaries
Audit helper sprawl and Effect control flow
Record accepted follow-ups or make small cleanup fixes
outputs: docs/exec-plans/active/<plan>.md final audit section when implementation is active
updated spec or architecture docs if final graphs differ
small cleanup commits if audit finds low-risk fixes

mandatoryVerification: browser verification for docs home page and one nested MDX page
rg audit for unsafe imports across apps/docs and packages/docs-content

completionCriteria: Final production, build, tests and audit call graphs are accurate.
Seam and boundary follow-ups are recorded with owners and verification.
Any low-risk cleanup discovered by the audit is implemented and verified.
The parent agent accepts the final architecture and validation story.
The task list is complete.
